/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/picolog_t.dir/picolog/picolog.c.o -o picolog_t  libpicoquic-log.a libpicoquic-core.a libpicoquic-log.a libpicoquic-core.a /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/deps/picotls/build/libpicotls-core.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/deps/picotls/build/libpicotls-openssl.a /Users/sean/Developer/moq-test-tools/tools/deps/picotls/build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a
